description:
Add a simple one-off model override for `delegate`, e.g. `--model cursor/composer-2`, so a single ticket can run with a different provider/model than the default beadwork configuration.

Scope:
- extend delegate CLI parsing in `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/argv.ts` / related command wiring
- thread the override through worker launch/config resolution without mutating global defaults
- support the existing `provider/model` style requested by the user
- add regression coverage for parsing and runtime propagation of the override
- document the new flag where delegate usage is described

Definition of done:
- tests added/updated under `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/__tests__`
- documentation updated where delegate flags/options are described
- `npm run lint -w @solvedbydev/pi-beadwork-extension`
- `npm run test -w @solvedbydev/pi-beadwork-extension`
- `npm run typecheck -w @solvedbydev/pi-beadwork-extension`
title: Add a per-delegate `--model provider/model` override
